title: 3 Key Roles of Sleep in Health

segments.text: Poor sleep can double your risk of illness.
But most people ignore its importance.
Sleep helps regulate your mood and emotions.
It boosts your immune system effectively.
Quality sleep enhances memory and learning.
Understanding sleep is key to better health.
Follow for daily tips your body will thank you for.

description: Discover how vital sleep is for your health. Follow for daily health tips! 🌙
